requestBody.name: modelKey
requestBody.description: The model key of the liveview

requestBody.name: name
requestBody.description: The name of this live view.

requestBody.name: isDefault
requestBody.description: Whether this live view is the default one for all viewers.

requestBody.name: isGlobal
requestBody.description: Whether this live view is global and available system-wide to all users

requestBody.name: layout
requestBody.description: The number of slots this live view contains. Which as a consequence also affects the layout of the live view.

requestBody.name: slots
requestBody.description: List of cameras visible in each given slot. And cycling settings for each slot if it has multiple cameras listed.

children.name: cycleMode
children.description: Whether to switch to next camera in slot based on motion events or a strict time interval

children.name: cycleInterval
children.description: How long should each camera stream be shown for in seconds until we cycle to the next camera

fields.name: modelKey
fields.description: The model key of the liveview

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of this live view.

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: Whether this live view is the default one for all viewers.

fields.name: isGlobal
fields.description: Whether this live view is global and available system-wide to all users

fields.name: layout
fields.description: The number of slots this live view contains. Which as a consequence also affects the layout of the live view.

fields.name: slots
fields.description: List of cameras visible in each given slot. And cycling settings for each slot if it has multiple cameras listed.

children.name: cycleMode
children.description: Whether to switch to next camera in slot based on motion events or a strict time interval

children.name: cycleInterval
children.description: How long should each camera stream be shown for in seconds until we cycle to the next camera

local.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = json.dumps({
  "id": "string",
  "modelKey": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "isDefault": True,
  "isGlobal": True,
  "owner": "string",
  "layout": 0,
  "slots": [
    {
      "cameras": [
        "string"
      ],
      "cycleMode": "motion",
      "cycleInterval": 0
    }
  ]
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/proxy/protect/integration/v1/liveviews", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Create live view
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/liveviews"
    method: POST
    body:
      id: string
      modelKey: string
      name: string
      isDefault: true
      isGlobal: true
      owner: string
      layout: 0
      slots:
        - cameras:
            - string
          cycleMode: motion
          cycleInterval: 0
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "id": "string",
  "modelKey": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "isDefault": True,
  "isGlobal": True,
  "owner": "string",
  "layout": 0,
  "slots": [
    {
      "cameras": [
        "string"
      ],
      "cycleMode": "motion",
      "cycleInterval": 0
    }
  ]
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/protect/integration/v1/liveviews", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Create live view
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/liveviews"
    method: POST
    body:
      id: string
      modelKey: string
      name: string
      isDefault: true
      isGlobal: true
      owner: string
      layout: 0
      slots:
        - cameras:
            - string
          cycleMode: motion
          cycleInterval: 0
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
